quotes: **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.

**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.

rules.intent: Maintain structural alignment and standard width across assembled email sections.
rules.rule_text: The email canvas uses a fixed width of 600px (dimension.canvas.width = 600px) with a 480px mobile breakpoint (breakpoint.grid.mobile = 480px) and a standard side padding of 24px (padding.section.side = 24px) for all sections to ensure seamless vertical assembly.

quotes: **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Maintain strict vertical rhythm and clean block nesting during template assembly.
rules.rule_text: All vertical spacings are built off an 8px base grid (spacing.grid.base_unit = 8px). Each section must own 32px of top/bottom internal padding (padding.section.vertical = 32px) to enable stacked assembly without external section margins. Internal flow gaps are constrained to 16px between heading and body (margin.flow.heading_to_body = 16px), 24px from body to CTA (margin.flow.body_to_cta = 24px), and 8px from image to caption (margin.flow.image_to_caption = 8px).

quotes: Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Enforce high-contrast CTA branding, interactive accessibility, and section layout constraints.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTAs must use Brand Blue (#00529b) background with White (#ffffff) Nunito Sans Bold 16px text, 14px 32px padding, and 24px pill corner radius. Secondary CTAs must feature a White background with a 2px Brand Blue border and text. The absolute minimum touch target height is 48px, and a section may contain at most one primary CTA.
